meaning: n.加,加起来,增加物,增加,加法
examples: There is, in addition, one further point to make.
She's ready to learn simple addition and subtraction.
In addition to headaches, you may develop stomach ulcers as well.
In addition, these immigrants give birth to fewer children than their counterparts, possibly indicating cultural assimilation.
So this is in addition to the GP services that are there at the moment.
